chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3620 - وَ سَأَلَ مُعَمَّرُ بْنُ خَلاَّدٍ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ حَبْسِ اَلطَّعَامِ سَنَةً فَقَالَ "أَنَا أَفْعَلُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3620 - Mu'ammar ibn Khallad asked Abu al-Hasan Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) about storing food for a year.
Imam (as) replied: "I do it myself."
